case_title: BRUNIG, CHRISTINE vs. MORGAN, VANESSA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUNIG, CHRISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, VANESSA FLINT, JASON DOES 1-30 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT FLINT, JASON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FLINT, JASON
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORGAN, VANESSA
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRUNIG, CHRISTINE COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-29-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#5 JDG WICK. CSR MARCIA HOLMES. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 9:45 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL SAUL FERSTER, BOTH DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. A STIP JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1270 LA PLAYA STREET APT 106, S.F. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EXECUTION STAYED TILL 5PM OCT 12, 1993. DEFTS TO LEAVE THE PREMISES BROOMCLEAN. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFTS COMPLY PLTF WAIVES ALL RENTS, ATTY FEES AND COSTS. PLTF TO RETAIN THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. FAILURE TO COMPLY JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE THE BACKRENT OF $780.00 PLUS $700.00 ATTY FEES AND COSTS(TO BE BROKEN DOWN ON JUDGMENT). PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, VANESSA FLINT, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1270 LA PLAYA STREET, APT. 106, S.F., STAYED UNTIL OCT-12-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS COMPLY, PLTF WAIVES ALL MONIES. FAILURE TO COMPLY DEFT TO PAY $780.00 RENT AND DAMAGES AND $700.00 ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. PLTF TO RETAIN DEFTS' SECURITY DEPOSIT. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
